characters.name: Abraham Buttrick
characters.description: Abraham Buttrickis a former U.S. Military Colonel. He served in the Vietnam War, during which he was held for a period of time as a prisoner of war. During the2012 United States presidential election, he served as theopposition party's nominee forvice president of the United States. Buttrick and Maryland SenatorSelina Meyerparticipated in one vice presidential debate during the fall of 2012. Meyer wrote about this in her memoir,A Woman First: First Woman: "[It] consisted mostly of his extended recounting of his time as a POW in Vietnam and the terrible things that were done to him during it, which I was too respectful of the sacrifices of our brave men and women in uniform to interrupt but which didn't seem to help his side much." The Hughes-Meyer ticket defeated the opposition ticket during the general election.

characters.name: Alejandro Montez
characters.description: Alejandro Montez(born 1963) is an Mexican - American businessman and lawyer who was theFirst Gentleman of the United Statesfrom 2017 to 2021, being married to former presidentLaura Montez.Montez was the first first gentleman in American history. He is the second first spouse to be born outside of the United States, afterLouisa Adams. Montez was born in Mexico. He later moved to New Mexico where he met Laura Cunningham. The two later got married and had three children. On January 20, 2017, his wife, Laura Montez wassworn-inas the 46th president of the United States, and the first elected woman president. By effect, Alejandro Montez became the inaugural holder of the title First Gentleman of the United States.

characters.name: Alethia James
characters.description: Alethia Jamesis the wife of former Connecticut SenatorTom James. She is portrayed byCrystal Hayes. Alethia married Tom James in 2017/18. As of July 2018, they were expecting their first child, who appeared beside the both of them when Tom announced hispresidential campaignin March 2019. Alethia voted forSelina Meyerin the2016 presidential election.

characters.name: Alicia Bryce
characters.description: Alicia Bryceis an activist and proponent for Universal Child Care. She is portrayed by actress Tracie Thoms. Bryce resides in Anacostia. She has a daughter named Halo. Bryce is an activist for Universal Child Care. She attended the October 2015 announcement ofSelina Meyer's 2016 presidential campaign.

characters.name: Alonzo Montez
characters.description: Alonzo Montezis the son ofLaura Montez, the 46thpresident of the United States, andAlejandro Montez. He is twins with his twin brotherJorge Montez.

characters.name: Andrea Tandy
characters.description: Andrea Tandyis the host ofAndrea Tandy Morning Newson MSNBC. WhenJonah Ryanbegan his news blog "Ryantology", MSNBC wanted to get him on to discuss Hughes switching his abortion stance and where Selina will fall. Dan threatens him not to say anything, and when Jonah is interviewed by Andrea, he has nothing to say and is humiliated on air. Andrea appears again inDebate, moderating thepresidential debateat the University of New Hampshire.

characters.name: Angstrom
characters.description: CongresswomanAngstromis a U.S. Representative who makes an appearance in theEast Wingepisode ofVeep, when Dan and Jonah try to convince her to support theFamilies First Bill.

characters.name: Ann James
characters.description: Ann Jamesserved as the United States Secretary of Housing and Urban Development under PresidentSelina Meyerfrom 2016 to 2017.

characters.name: Ann James

characters.name: Anna
characters.description: Annais a lawyer. She was a friend ofSelina Meyer, going back to the 1990s. In the early 1990s, Anna used to practice law withSelina Meyer,Deborah, andSarah. They bonded at the time. In September 2016, Meyer arranged for the four to have a night in theExecutive Residenceand have dinner together, discussing fond memories--and their attraction towardsTom James. Meyer blew up at them in anger and the night is furthermore ruined when an intruder breaks into the White House, the second time that day.

characters.name: Annette Splett
characters.description: Annette Splettis the currentfirst lady of the United States. She is the wife of PresidentRichard Splett. They got married at some point between 2021 and 2041. She is portrayed byTish Graves.

characters.name: Charlie Baird
characters.description: Charles Baird, Jr.is an American banker who served as theUnited States Secretary of the Treasuryfrom 2017 to 2021 in the administration of PresidentLaura Montez. Prior to this, he was the CEO ofEM Wheelright. Baird was the CEO ofEM Wheelright. During the2016 United States presidential election, he financially supportedBill O'Brien's campaign for the presidency. On November 11, 2016, newly-appointed economy czarTom Jamesassembled a banking task force to help right the economy after the 2016 election'seconomic fallout. PresidentSelina Meyertook over the meeting and gave Baird a personal tour of theWest Wingand theExecutive Residence. They engaged in a sexual fling that night. The next day, it was reported that Baird had a meeting withBill O'Briento discuss him serving as Treasury Secretary in a potential O'Brien administration. Baird appeared apologetic as they continued their relationship.

characters.name: Ben-Haim
characters.description: Ben-Haimis an Israeli politician who served as Prime Minister of Israel. He visited the White House in February 2016 and met with PresidentSelina Meyerto negotiate a historic Middle East peace deal. Sometime between 2016 and 2021, he was succeeded by a new Prime Minister named David[1].

characters.description: CongresswomanBennettis a member of the congressional committee inTestimonywho look into the Meyer administration's misdoings during the hearings. She is portrayed byMelanie Nicholls-King.

characters.name: Beth Hennick
characters.description: Beth Hennickis the wife and half sister of the 49thvice president of the United StatesJonah Ryanand served as second lady of the United States from 2021 to Ryan's impeachment partway through his term. Beth was born toLloyd Hennickand an unnamed woman. Prior to marrying her former stepbrotherJonah Ryanin 2019 she had a son,Clay Hennick, with another man. Later it was revealed that Lloyd was Jonah's biological father, and Beth is his half-sister. In 2019, former New Hampshire Congressman Jonah Ryan announced at a New Hampshire rally that he recently was married to Hennick. However, it was later revealed that they were half-siblings.

In 2019, former New Hampshire Congressman Jonah Ryan announced at a New Hampshire rally that he recently was married to Hennick. However, it was later revealed that they were half-siblings.

characters.name: Bob Bradley
characters.description: Bob Bradleyis a political aide who served in the White House during the 1980s. He helped assistSelina Meyer's2016 presidential campaignduring theNevada recount. Bradley andSelina Meyermaintain a good friendship, and it is suggested that they have known eachother for many years. He also maintains a distant and formal friendship withJames Whitman, a former Secretary of State. It is later revealed that Bob suffers from Alzheimer's. Bradley is a political expert, who previously worked in the White House where he served as a mentor toBen Cafferty.Kent Davisonsays that Bradley "served in more administrations than any man alive." It is mentioned by Kent that he "hasn't worked in the White House since the late eighties", meaning he left under President Reagan orPresident Stevenson.

characters.name: Amy Brookheimer
characters.description: Amy Brookheimeris a political staffer who has served twice as the vice president's chief of staff, under both Vice PresidentsSelina MeyerandJonah Ryan. Brookheimer has a long history serving under Selina Meyer, having worked for Meyer from 2003 to 2019, including briefly running Meyer's2016 presidential campaign, and running Jonah Ryan's2020 presidential campaignbefore he became vice president. Brookheimer has one sister, Sophie, who has three children with two different men and who works at CVS.She has very little personal life to speak of.Sometime prior to the start of the show she andDan Eganbriefly dated. Brookheimer attended the University of Pennsylvania from 1998 to 2002. In 2002, she was a server at "Shakey's Pizza" and joined the office of Senator Selina Meyer in 2003. Later that year, she would become Chief of Staff to the Senator.

characters.name: Sophie Brookheimer
characters.description: Sophie Brookheimeris the sister ofAmy Brookheimer. Sophie is Amy Brookheimer's sister, and they do not get along most of the time. Sophie has several children from several different men. Sophie is an employee for CVS.

characters.name: Sophie Brookheimer

characters.name: Ben Cafferty
characters.description: Benjamin Cafferty(born May 24, 1956) served as theWhite House Chief of Stafffrom 2013 to 2017, serving underStuart HughesandSelina Meyer. He also acted as campaign manager to Meyer's2020 presidential campaign, and briefly served as chief of staff toJonah Ryanfor a brief time during Ryan's congressional tenure. Cafferty is a graduate of Rutgers University, meaning he possibly grew up near/around New Jersey. Cafferty has had at least four heart attacks. His third heart attack occurred in 2010, where he met his fourth wifeJoyce. Despite having a family, Cafferty doesn't appear to be close with them, including insisting that Meyer doesn't call them regarding his heart attack in the series finale.

characters.name: Buddy Calhoun
characters.description: January 4, 2018 - January 17, 2021 January 12, 2013 - January 8, 2017 Arnold "Buddy" Calhounis an American politician who served as the twelfthUnited States secretary of educationunderPresidentSelina Meyer from 2021 to 2025. He previously served as the 30th Governor of Nevada from 2018 to 2021 and as Secretary of State of Nevada from 2013 to 2017. He was a candidate in the2020 presidential primaries.

characters.name: Candi Caruso
characters.description: Candi Carusoserved as theWhite House Chief of StafftoPresident Montezfrom 2017 to 2021. Candi's original name was Candice but she changed it to Candi. She is very attractive, and can't seem to get a job in theSelina Meyeradministration. Went to Harvard Law and clerked for Supreme Court Justice Tenny. Candi first appears inMorning Afteras Selina needs someone to head up the Nevada recount. Amy begs Selina for the position, so Candi is dismissed. She then appears inC**Tgate, offered yet another job, but dismissed again. InCongressional Ball, Candi appears, having just been engaged to Gary Welsh (who everyone mistook forGary Walsh), who was named on the 50 Hottest D.C. Staffers list. InInauguration, she gets a job working as Chief of Staff for theMontezadministration.

characters.name: Cassie Langley
characters.description: Cassie Langleyis a single mother living near Palo Alto, California. On October 27, 2015, she confronted Vice PresidentSelina Meyerduring a campaign stop regarding Meyer's fracking policies. This resulted in a viral video confronted byJonah Ryan.
